title: leucophyllum candidum
intro: Leucophyllum candidum, also known as the White Texas Sage, is a drought-tolerant shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Its health benefits include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu due to its expectorant and decongestant properties. Leucophyllum candidum can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
